extortion.description: Handala Hack Breaches Allen Carr’s Easyway Company in Supply Chain Attack, Dump Customer Database and Targets Zionists with WhatsApp Messages Handala has successfully infiltrated the systems of Allen Carr’s Easyway, the popular method for overcoming addiction. Allen Carr’s Easyway is the largest addiction treatment institution in the occupied territories! Handala executed a sophisticated supply chain…
